panels.title: trigger exec ops density per account
trigger exec per minute per account
trigger exec per minute per trigger
trigger exec ops per minute per account

targets.expr: ((((sum(increase(iotbridge_trigger_engine_execcount_bucket{le="+Inf", accountId=~"$accountId"}[$__range])) by (accountId,triggerId) - sum(increase(iotbridge_trigger_engine_execcount_bucket{le="500000", accountId=~"$accountId"}[$__range])) by (accountId,triggerId))))>0) + on(triggerId) group_left(name) iotbridge_trigger_map{}

((((sum(increase(iotbridge_trigger_engine_execcount_bucket{le="+Inf", accountId=~"$accountId"}[$__range])) by (accountId,triggerId) - sum(increase(iotbridge_trigger_engine_execcount_bucket{le="20000", accountId=~"$accountId"}[$__range])) by (accountId,triggerId))))>0) + on(triggerId) group_left(accountName,triggerName) iotbridge_trigger_map{}
